User.title: User Profile
User.description: Profile details of a student or developer using Android AI Arena

email.description: The user's verified Google email address

Session.title: Interview Session
Session.description: An interactive AI-guided practice interview session with scores, feedback, and transcripts

id.description: Unique identifier of the interview session

userId.description: UID of the candidate user who completed this session

topic.description: The custom academic or platform topic

interviewerId.description: Identifier of the simulated interviewer persona

history.description: Array of question/answer history entries representing the rounds

/users/{userId}.description: User profile collection partitioned by Google UID

/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Interview session logs owned by users
